prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-BLUNTSCISSR-55-IR-TT Product Type: SCISSORS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Stainless Steel Scissors 5.5 Inch Straight Blade Blunt Point Edge Description: The ToolTreaux scissors feature super-sharp 5.5" blunt point straight blades that are ideal for precision cutting. You can count on them to cut through tougher materials like thick fabric, cardboard, and construction paper unlike other scissors of the same size.

Our scissors come with ergonomic and smooth finger holes to provide comfort and prevent slippage during use to protect your hands from injury while cutting. They weigh just .08lbs so you can easily store them inside your pocket, toolbox, tool belt, or crafting kit for on-the-go use.

Made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel, these scissors won't rust to ensure a longer service life than other standard shears. Utilize them for a variety of applications like tailoring, sewing, hobby projects, crafting, and more. Search Terms: scissors kitchen scissors scissors for school kids hair scissors hair cutting scissors scissors all purpose fabric scissors herb scissors medical scissors scissors for office sewing scissors embroider scissors left handed scissors bandage scissors Features: - BLUNT POINT STRAIGHT BLADES - ToolTreaux scissors feature blunt point straight blade edges ideal for sharp and precise cutting. Cut through tough materials like thick fabric and construction paper - COMFORTABLE GRIP - Scissors provide an ergonomic comfortable grip to prevent slippage during use and protect your hands from injury while cutting - LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE - Scissors come with 5.5" blades and weigh just .08lbs; easily store them inside of your pocket, toolbox, tool belt, or craft storage organizer when not in use - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won't rust to ensure a long service life; utilize these shears for a variety of applications including tailoring, crafting, hobby projects, and more - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: stainless steel; Dimensions: Overall length 6.5", Blade length 5.5"; Weight: .08lbs (1.28oz); Blade type: blunt point straight edge; Can cut through thick materials === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 5.5 Inch Stainless Steel Blunt Point Scissors

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 5.5-Inch Stainless Steel Blunt Point Scissors

anthropic.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel, Ergonomic Grip, Cuts Thick Fabric And Cardboard, Lightweight And Portable

openai.title_differentiation: Blunt Point Straight Blades, Comfortable Grip, Rust Resistant Steel, Cuts Thick Fabric, Lightweight Portable
